DEFENDANTS/CROSS-COMPLAINANT'S OBJECTIONS TO EVIDENCE ARE SUSTAINED INCLUDING THE LATE FILED OBJECTION IN THE DECLARATION OF ARTHUR LIPTON WHICH ARE OBJECTIONS 1 THROUGH 4 FILED BY DEFENDANTS/CROSS-COMPLAINANT'S ON NOVEMBER 13, 2012. Mtn To Strike
Off Calendar Nov-13-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. ARTHUR C. LIPTON OF THE LAW OFFICE OF LIPTON & PIPER, LLP, TEL. NO. 362-6286 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINIFF AND CROSS-DEFENDANT;
ATTY. DANIEL J. O'CONNELL, TEL. NO. 272-3811 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT/CROSS-COMPLAINANT.

RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT MODIFIED THE TENTATIVE RULING AND RULED AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF/CROSS-DEFENDANT FRED GORSIRA'S SPECIAL Motion To Strike is Granted. The fourth cause of action for abuse of process falls within the ambit of the anti-SLAPP statute. Cross-Complainants has not met their burden of showing a probability of success on the merits of any aspect of the abuse of process cause of action. Defendants/Cross-Complainant's Objections to Evidence are sustained including the late filed objection in the Declaration of Arthur Lipton which are Objections 1 through 4 filed by Defendants/Cross-Complainant's on November 13, 2012. Attorney fees are awarded to Plaintiff/Cross-defendant Gorsira in an amount to be later determined upon a showing by Plaintiff/Cross-defendant. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Marla Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR # 7077 =302/MJM
